---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, game, accessibility improvement, or idea for Focus Adventure
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

# Feature Request

Thank you for helping improve Focus Adventure.

Focus Adventure is built with children, including children with ADHD, in mind. We welcome ideas that can make the project more useful, engaging, accessible, safe, and enjoyable.

## What problem does this feature solve?

Please describe the problem, limitation, or opportunity you have identified.

## What would you like to see?

Describe your proposed feature or improvement.

Please explain how you imagine it working.

## Who would benefit from this feature?

For example:

- Children with ADHD
- Parents or caregivers
- Educators
- All users
- Developers or contributors
- Accessibility users

## Is this related to a new game or activity?

If yes, please describe:

- How the game works
- What skills or abilities it is intended to practice
- How difficulty could progress
- How children receive feedback or rewards

If not applicable, write:

N/A

## Accessibility Considerations

Could this feature improve or affect:

- Keyboard accessibility?
- Screen-reader support?
- Color contrast?
- Reduced-motion support?
- Touch interaction?
- Cognitive accessibility?

Please describe any considerations you have.

## Child Safety and Privacy

Would this feature involve any of the following?

- User accounts
- Personal information
- Analytics or tracking
- Cloud storage
- AI services
- Social or communication features
- Third-party services

If yes, please explain.

If not, write:

N/A

## Additional Information

Add any mockups, screenshots, research, examples, references, or other information that may help us understand your idea.
